title: Haunted Horizons 16x Halloween Pack
description: A dark Halloween themed pack made to work well for both PvP and Survival Minecraft. Enjoy!
body: This is my Halloween Texturepack for 2024. It changes the overall atmosphere to be more spooky and darker. The color theme is dark green. The pack is available for java 1.8.9, java 1.21.1+ and will soon be available for bedrock edition too. It is mainly made for pvp, but also works well for survival minecraft. It changes many important overworld blocks, many items and it also includes easter eggs like villagers wearing Halloween costumes. If you run the pack using optifine or a pvp client, it also includes a custom sky. I hope that you will enjoy the pack.
